bidding.note: Clean 1D-1S-2H reverse (17, 5D-4H). North rebids 2S; South's raise to 4S on a 5-2 fit fails. 3N defensible.
1C-1S-2D reverse (17, 5C-4D). North's 2H is fourth-suit asking a stopper; South 3N lands +1. Clean.
Sound 1C-1H-2D reverse (18). North's jump to 5C skips exploration; misses cold slam. Preference 3D or 3N defensible.
1D-1S-2H reverse (18, 5D-4H). North's natural 3N is sound; makes exactly. Clean display.
1D-1S-2H reverse (20, 5D-4H). North 3C fourth-suit asking; South 3N makes +3. Clean.
1C-1H-2D reverse (18). 2S fourth-suit then 2N-3H-3N is a long but sound continuation landing in 3N.
1C-1S-2D reverse (17, 5C-4D). North 2H fourth-suit; South 3N makes exactly. Clean.
1D-1S-2H reverse (19, 5D-4H). North 3C fourth-suit; South 3N makes exactly. Clean.
Clean 1D-1S-2H reverse, but North leaps past 3N to 6H, doubled and down. Runaway slam obscures the teaching point.
1C-1H-2D reverse (17, 5C-4D). North 2N natural 6-9; minimum reverse correctly passes 2N. Textbook rule even though it drifts off.
1D-1S-2H reverse (18, 5D-4H). North's 3N makes exactly. Clean.
1C-1H-2D reverse (17, 5C-4D). North 2S fourth-suit; South 3N is sound bidding though it drifts one off.
1C-1H-2D reverse (17, 5C-4D). North's 3N makes +2. Clean.
1C-1S-2D reverse (17, 5C-4D). North 2H fourth-suit; South 3N makes exactly. Clean.
1D-1N-2H reverse (17, 5D-4H) after 1NT response. North 2N; minimum reverse passes. Textbook continuation though it drifts off.
1D-1S-2H reverse (17, 5D-4H). North gives 3D preference with 3 diamonds; exactly the taught weak continuation. Makes +1.
1C-1S-2D reverse (17, 5C-4D). North gives 3C preference back to the first suit; clean weak-responder continuation. Makes +2.
1C-1H-2D reverse (19, 5C-4D). North's 3N makes exactly. Clean.
1D-1S-2H reverse (17, 5D-4H). North 2N natural 6-9; minimum reverse correctly passes. Textbook rule though it drifts off.
1C-1S-2D reverse (17, 5C-4D). North 2H fourth-suit; South 3N makes +1. Clean.
1C-1H-2D reverse (19). North rebids 2H, South 2S fourth-suit, lands 3N. Sound but wandering continuation.
1C-1S-2D reverse (17, 5C-4D). North's 3N makes exactly. Clean.
1D-1S-2H reverse (19, 5D-4H). North 3D preference then South 3N; sound continuation with a short tail. Makes exactly.
1C-1H-2D reverse (18). 2S fourth-suit then 2N-3H-3N; long but sound continuation landing in 3N+1.
1D-1S-2H reverse (19, 5D-4H). North raises the second suit to 4H on 4-card support; sound heart-fit game, makes with a long tail.
Clean 1D-1S-2H reverse (17). North rebids 2S (6 spades); South passing with a singleton and 17 is debatable, 3S defensible.
Clean reverse + 4SF, but North overrides with 6S on a self-sufficient 8-bagger. Makes, but the slam buries the reverse theme; 4S defensible.
1D-1S-2H reverse (18, 5D-4H). North's 3N makes exactly. Clean.
1C-1H-2D reverse (17, 5C-4D). North 2S fourth-suit; South 3N is sound bidding though it drifts one off.
1D-1S-2H reverse (17, 5D-4H). North's 3N makes exactly. Clean.
S 19, 1D-1S-2H true reverse (5D-4H). N 4SF 3C, S 3N. Clean reverse with stopper-ask continuation, lands 3N.
S 20, sound 1D-1S-2H reverse, but long RKC slam tail to 6S obscures the reverse a bit.
S 18, 1C-1S-2D reverse (5C-4D). N jumps 3N with 9 bal. Sound bidding; 3N just fails on layout, not a bidding flaw.
S 18, 1D-1S-2H reverse (5D-4H). N 3N. Clean reverse, sensible 3N making.
S 17, 1D-1S-2H reverse. N 10 raises to 3N. Clean reverse to a sound 3N.
S 17, 1C-1S-2D reverse. Weak N (7) has only 2C, so raises the 4-card D suit 3D rather than preference. Good 'when not to prefer' case.
S 17, sound 1D-1S-2H reverse, but long RKC slam tail to 6D dilutes the teaching point.
S 17, 1D-1S-2H reverse. Weak N (7) with 3D gives proper preference 3D; S passes. Textbook preference after a reverse.
S 17, 1C-1S-2D reverse. N 4SF 2H asking stopper, S 3N. Clean reverse + fourth-suit continuation.
S 17, sound 1D-1S-2H reverse, N 6 spades. RKC try then signs off 5S; a slam-try tail beyond the reverse theme.
S 20, classic 1C-1H-2D reverse (5C-4D). N 11 raises 3N. Clean, sensible game.
S 17, 1C-1S-2D reverse, N 4SF 2H then 3N. Bidding sound; 3N fails only on a bad layout (W 10 HCP behind).
S 18, 1D-1S-2H reverse. N 12 raises 3N. Clean reverse, sound game.
S 17, 1C-1H-2D reverse (5C-4D). N 9 raises 3N. Clean reverse to game.
S 18, 1D-1S-2H reverse. N 6 bids natural 2N on an unbalanced 1-3-5 hand with 3D; preference 3D is the cleaner weak action. S correctly passes minimum.
S 17, 1D-1S-2H reverse. N 4SF 3C, S 3N. Clean reverse + stopper-ask, sound game.
S 17, 1D-1S-2H reverse. N 10 raises 3N. Clean reverse, sensible game.
S 19, 1C-1S-2D reverse. N 4SF 2H, S 2N, N 3S, S 3N. Sound reverse with a slightly wandering search for 3N.
S 17, 1D-1S-2H reverse. Weak N (7) gives proper preference 3D; S passes. Textbook preference example.
S 19, 1D-1S-2H reverse. N 4SF 3C, S 3N. Clean reverse + stopper-ask, sound game.
S 17, 1C-1S-2D reverse, E doubles. N pulls S's 3N to 4S on a 7-card spade suit; passing 3N is the defensible alternative. 4S fails on layout.
S 20, 1D-1S-2H reverse. Weak N rebids 2S, S drives 4th-suit then 5D; long auction but the strong reverse is on display.
S 18, 1C-1H-2D reverse. Weak N (7) rebids 6-card hearts 2H, S 2N, N passes. Sound minimum-responder auction.
S 17, 1D-1S-2H reverse, E doubles 4SF 3C. S 3S shows 3-card spade support, N raises 4S. Sound reverse finding the 5-3 fit.
S 20, 1C-1H-2D reverse. N 2N natural 6-9. S 20 pulls to 3H but with that strength should drive game; 4H makes. Underbid continuation.
S 18, 1D-1S-2H reverse. N 4SF 3C, S 3S (3-card support), N 4S. Sound reverse finding the 5-3 spade fit.
S 17, 1D-1S-2H reverse. Weak N (6) gives proper preference 3D; S passes. Textbook preference; just down on layout.
S 17, 1C-1S-2D reverse. N 4SF 2H, S 3N. Bidding sound; 3N fails only on the bad break (W 10 HCP).
S 17, 1C-1S-2D reverse. N 4SF 2H, S 3N. Clean reverse + stopper-ask, sound game.
S 17, 1D-1S-2H reverse. Weak N rebids 6-card spades 2S; S raises to game 4S with extras and a 5-2 fit. Sound.
S 17 HCP, 5C-4D: 1C-1H-2D is a clean reverse. N bids natural 3N. Lands well, 3N=9.
S 18 HCP 5C-4D, clean 1C-1S-2D reverse. Long slam tail (4SF, RKCB) to a sound 6S; tail obscures the reverse a bit.
S 17 HCP 5C-4D, 1C-1H-2D reverse. N jumps to natural 3N. Clean reverse on display, 3N=9.
S 17 HCP 5C-4D reverse. N 7 HCP gives preference back to 3C; partnership rightly stops short of game. Preference continuation worth a word.
S 17 HCP, 5D-4H: 1D-1S-2H clean reverse. N bids natural 3N. 3N=10.
S 17 HCP 5D-4H reverse, then 3C/3S, jump to 6D. Sound reverse but the 6D slam tail is the longer story.
S 17 HCP 5C-4D reverse 1C-1H-2D. N 7 HCP gives preference to 2H, S passes. Partnership stops in 2H; weak responder preference.
S 17 HCP 5D-4H reverse, 3C 4SF, N 3N. Sound; the 4SF continuation needs a sentence. 3N=9.
S 18 HCP 5D-4H, 1D-1S-2H clean reverse. N natural 3N, 13 DD tricks.
S 17 HCP 5D-4H reverse. N 7 bal bids natural 2N; min reverse passes per style. But 2N goes down both ways; pushing 3N debatable.
S 19 HCP 5D-4H, 1D-1S-2H clean reverse. N natural 3N=11.
S 17 HCP 5C-4D, 1C-1S-2D reverse. N 12 HCP drives 3N. Clean, 3N=10.
S 18 HCP 5D-4H reverse over 1N response (1D-1N-2H). N 11 raises to 3N. Reverse after 1NT is a slightly less common shape.
S 17 HCP 5C-4D reverse, 2S 4SF, N 3N. Sound; 4SF stopper-ask continuation worth a sentence. 3N=9.
S 18 HCP 5C-4D reverse; E doubles 2S 4SF, N bids 3N which goes down both ways. Reverse is sound but final 3N contract debatable.
S 17 HCP 5C-4D, 1C-1H-2D reverse, N natural 3N=11. Clean.
S 17 HCP 5C-4D reverse, 2H 4SF, N 3N. Sound; the 4SF stopper-ask continuation merits a sentence. 3N=9.
S 17 HCP 5D-4H reverse, 3C 4SF, N 3N. Sound reverse; 4SF continuation worth noting. 3N=10.
S 18 HCP 5C-4D clean reverse; long RKCB slam tail to 6D. Sound but the slam auction is the bigger story than the reverse.
S 19 HCP 5C-4D reverse 1C-1H-2D; 2S 4SF then RKCB to 6H. Sound reverse, slam tail is the longer tale.
S 17 HCP 5D-4H, 1D-1S-2H reverse, N natural 3N=9. Clean.
S 19 HCP 5D-4H reverse, 3C 4SF, N 3N. Sound; 4SF stopper-ask worth a sentence. 3N=11.
S 17 HCP 5C-4D reverse, 2S 4SF, N 3N. Sound; 4SF continuation merits a note. 3N=12.
S 18 HCP 5D-4H reverse 1D-1S-2H; N 7 HCP with 4-card heart support jumps to 4H. Quick jump to game on the fit, sound.
S 20 HCP 5C-4D clean reverse; very long 2N/4D/RKCB slam auction to 6D. Sound but the slam tail dominates the board.
S 20 HCP 5C-4D reverse; N 7 prefers 2H, S reverses again into 2S then N 4H. Roundabout to 4H game; debatable continuation.
S 18 HCP 5C-4D reverse 1C-1H-2D; N raises 3D, S 3N. Sound; the diamond-raise then 3N continuation worth a sentence. 3N=9.
S 17 HCP 5D-4H reverse, 3C 4SF, N 3N. Sound; 4SF stopper-ask continuation. 3N=9 (11 DD).
S 19 HCP 5D-4H reverse, 3C 4SF then 4S/RKCB to 6S. Sound reverse; slam tail is the larger story.
S 17 HCP 5C-4D reverse; N leaps to 5C with club support. Aggressive jump to 5-minor over 3N; final contract debatable. 5C=11.
S 19 HCP 5D-4H, clean 2H reverse; balanced N jumps to 3N. Reverse on clear display.
S 18 5D-4H reverse; N 6 bal bids natural 2N, min S passes. Textbook min-reverse-opposite-2N.
S 18 5D-4H reverse; N 7 natural 2N, min S passes. Clean pass of natural 2NT.
S 17 5C-4D, 2D reverse; N 8 with 4C gives preference to 3C. Clean preference teaching.
S 17 5D-4H reverse; N 10 bids 3C 4th-suit asking stopper, S 3N. Sound, 4SF wrinkle.
S 17 5D-4H reverse; N 11, 3C 4th-suit then 3N. Sound 4SF continuation.
S 17 5C-4D reverse; N 12, 2H 4th-suit asking stopper, S 3N. Sound 4SF wrinkle.
S 18 5C-4D reverse; longer 2H 4SF-2N-3N continuation. Sound but wandery.
S 17 5C-4D reverse; N 6S. 2H 4SF, S 2S delayed 3-card support, N 4S. 6-3 fit, sound.
S 17 5C-4D reverse; N 12 bal jumps 3N. Clean reverse, sound game.
S 17 5C-4D reverse; N 10 with 4D leaps to 5D game. Sound minor game, big-jump wrinkle.
S 18 5D-4H reverse over 1NT response; N 9 bids 3N. Clean 1D-1N-2H reverse.
S 18 5C-4D reverse; N 6H. 2S 4SF-2N-3H-3N. Sound but long, wandery continuation.
S 18 5D-4H reverse; N 10 jumps 3N. Clean reverse, sound game.
S 17 5D-4H reverse; N 8 with 6C and D-void jumps 3N. Practical but odd void in opener's suit.
S 20 5C-4D reverse; N 6 natural 2N, S 20 raises to 3N. Correct given big extras.
S 17 5C-4D reverse; N 11, 2H 4th-suit asking stopper, S 3N. Sound 4SF continuation.
S 17 5D-4H reverse; N 9, 3C 4th-suit then 3N. Bidding sound; dd wrong-sided is a play issue.
S 17 5D-4H reverse over 1NT; N 7 bids 2N, min S passes. Clean min-reverse pass.
S 18 5C-4D reverse; N 11, 2S 4th-suit-2N-3N. Sound 4SF continuation.
S 17 5C-4D reverse; N 9, 2H 4th-suit asking stopper, S 3N. Sound 4SF wrinkle.
S 17 5C-4D reverse but singleton spade; N rebids 6-card 2S, S passes misfit. 2S+1; bidding 2N defensible.
S 17 5C-4D reverse; N 10 jumps 3N. Clean reverse, sound game.
S 18 5C-4D reverse; N 12 5D-5H. 4SF then RKCB to good 6D double-fit. Long slam tail.
S 17 5D-4H reverse; N 7 jumps 3N (24 combined, thin, dd down). 2N invite defensible.
S 17 5D-4H reverse; N 9 jumps 3N (26 combined). Clean reverse, sound game.
S 20 5C-4D reverse; N 11 jumps 3N. Sound, though 31 combined leaves a slam tail.
S 17 5C-4D reverse, Dx spade; N rebids 6-card 2S, S raises to 4S on doubleton. 6-2 makes; 3N defensible.
S 17 5C-4D reverse but singleton heart; N rebids 6-card 2H, S passes misfit. 2H+1; 2N defensible.
S 19 5D-4H reverse; N 6 with 3D gives preference 3D, S pushes 3N. Clean preference, 3N thin.
1C-1S-2D, S 5C-4D 18 HCP, textbook reverse showing extras; N drives 3NT, lands well.
1D-1S-2H, S 5D-4H 18 HCP, clean reverse; N 3NT, sensible landing.
1D-1S-2H, S 5D-4H 18 HCP, sound reverse; N 9 HCP to 3NT.
1C-1H-2D, S 5C-4D 17 HCP minimum reverse; N 3NT, sound.
Sound 1C-1S-2D reverse; N's leap to 5C is debatable and fails DD where 3NT makes.
1C-1H-2D reverse, S 20 HCP; N's 7 hearts drive RKC slam, 6H makes 12. Long slam tail.
1C-1H-2D reverse 17 HCP; N's 2S fourth-suit stopper-ask then 3NT, makes exactly.
1D-1S-2H reverse; N's 7 spades, 3C 4th-suit then 3N, corrects to 4S, makes 5.
1D-1S-2H, S 5D-4H 17 HCP reverse; N 3NT, makes exactly.
1D-1S-2H reverse 17 HCP; N 12 HCP to 3NT, makes exactly.
Sound 1C-1S-2D reverse; N pulls 3NT to 4S on 4-3 fit (S only 3), debatable; both make 10.
1D-1S-2H reverse 17 HCP; weak N (7 HCP, 3+D) gives 3D preference, S passes. Model.
1C-1H-2D reverse 19 HCP; N 3NT, makes 11.
1D-1S-2H reverse 17 HCP; N 3NT, makes exactly.
1C-1NT-2D reverse, S 5C-4D 19 HCP; N 3NT over reverse, makes 11.
1D-1S-2H reverse 18 HCP; N 3C 4th-suit, E doubles, then 3N-4H lands 4-4 fit, makes 12.
1D-1S-2H reverse 19 HCP; N 6-5 with 6 spades, 3C 4th-suit then 3N, corrects 4S, makes 11.
1C-1H-2D reverse 17 HCP; N 11 HCP to 3NT, makes 10.
1C-1S-2D reverse 17 HCP; N's 2H fourth-suit then 3NT, makes 10.
1C-1H-2D reverse 18 HCP; N 3NT, makes plenty.
Sound 1D-1S-2H reverse; N's jump to 5D on 8 HCP is an overbid, fails DD; 3D preference is safer.
1D-1S-2H reverse 17 HCP; weak N (7 HCP) gives 3D preference, S passes. Model partscore.
1C-1S-2D reverse 18 HCP; N 6 spades, 2H 4th-suit then 2N-3S-3N, lands 3NT makes 10.
1C-1H-2D reverse 17 HCP; N's natural 2NT (6-9 bal), minimum S passes. Model pass-2NT.
1C-1S-2D reverse 19 HCP; N natural 2N, S's extras raise to 3N, makes exactly.
1C-1H-2D reverse 17 HCP; weak N (8 HCP, 3+C) gives 3C preference, S passes. Model.
1C-1H-2D reverse 19; N gives 3C pref on 6 HCP, then 3NT pushed off (combined 25), fails DD.
1D-1S-2H reverse 19 HCP; N 7 spades, 3C 4th-suit then 3N, corrects 4S, makes 13.
1C-1H-2D reverse 19 HCP; N 6 hearts, 2S 4th-suit then 2N-3H-3N, lands 3NT makes 10.
1D-1S-2H reverse 19 HCP; N 3D preference, S tries 3S, lands 5D making 12. Minor-game tail.
S 17 HCP 5D-4H, clean 2H reverse; N leaps 3N, lands 9=. Reverse principle on clear display.
S 18 HCP 5C-4D reverse; 2H 4SF stopper-ask wrinkle, 2N-3S-3N, lands 3N+2. Sound but wanders.
S 17 HCP 5D-4H, clean 2H reverse; N jumps 3N=9. Textbook display.
S 17 minimum reverse 5D-4H; N 7 bal 2N natural, S correctly passes minimum. Pass-2N principle on display.
S 17 HCP 5C-4D reverse; 2H 4SF then jump 3N. Thin 3N goes down on DD but auction is sound.
S 17 5C-4D reverse; N 6 HCP 5H, gives natural 2N, S passes minimum. Sound; N could prefer rebidding hearts.
S 17 5C-4D reverse; N 9 HCP 2H 4SF then 3N=9. Sound, minor 4SF wrinkle.
S 19 5C-4D reverse; N 8 gives club preference 3C then 3N=9 (10 DD). Sound preference auction.
S 18 5C-4D reverse, N jumps 3N; S pulls to 4S on a 4-3 spade fit (Q83). Pass 3N defensible and cleaner.
S 19 5C-4D reverse; long Blackwood tail to cold 6D=13. Reverse sound but slam tail buries the point.
S 18 5C-4D reverse; N 8 raises 3D then 3N=10. Sound diamond-raise continuation.
S 19 5C-4D reverse; N 2N natural, S 3H cue, 3N=10. Sound but a wandering continuation.
S 17 minimum 5C-4D reverse; N 7 bal 2N natural, S passes minimum. Pass-2N principle on display.
S 18 5C-4D reverse; N 11 jumps 3N=11. Clean reverse, sound game.
S 20 5C-4D reverse, but a 6-call RKCB slam exploration (2N/4H/4N/5C/5D/5N/6H) buries the teaching point.
S 19 5D-4H reverse; N 9 3C 4SF then 3N=10. Sound, 4SF stopper-ask wrinkle.
S 20 5C-4D reverse but long RKCB tail (2N/4H/4N/5C/5H) stopping in 5H=12; slam-try maze obscures the reverse.
S 18 5D-4H reverse; N 9 jumps 3N=10. Clean reverse, sound game.
S 17 minimum 5D-4H reverse over 1NT response (1D-1N-2H); N 7 2N, S passes minimum. Textbook.
S 18 5D-4H reverse; N 9 3C 4SF then 3N=9. Sound, 4SF stopper-ask wrinkle.
S 20 5C-4D reverse; N 10 leaps to 5C on only 3-card support, skipping 3N. 3N defensible and better at MP.
S 18 5C-4D reverse; N 2H 4SF, rebids 2S (5), S raises 4S=12 on 5-3 fit. Sound.
S 17 5D-4H reverse; N 4SF 3C, S 3N, N pulls to 4-4 heart fit 4H=12. Good fit-find continuation.
S 19 5C-4D reverse; N 7 gives club preference 3C then 3N=9 (10 DD). Sound preference auction.
S 18 5C-4D reverse; N 7 club preference 3C then 3N=9 (10 DD). Sound preference auction.
S 18 5D-4H reverse; N 7 rebids 2S (6), S 2N, N 3N. Thin 3N goes down on DD but auction is sound.
S 17 5D-4H reverse; N 9 3C 4SF then 3N=9 (10 DD). Sound, 4SF wrinkle.
S 18 5D-4H reverse; N 10 3C 4SF then 3N=10 (12 DD). Sound, 4SF wrinkle.
S 17 minimum 5C-4D reverse; N 6 bal 2N natural, S passes minimum. Pass-2N principle on display.
S 18 5C-4D reverse; N 7 rebids 2H (6), S 2N, pass. Sound; N rebids own suit rather than preference.
1D-1S-2H is a clean 5-4 reverse with 17. North's 3N on 9 bal is sound; contract fails on the cards but the auction is correct.
Clean 5D-4H reverse, 17. North's 3C asks for a stopper, South confirms with 3N. Lands sound, makes 10.
Sound 5D-4H reverse, 18. Auction tails into a long RKCB slam try landing in 5S; the reverse point survives but the tail is long.
1C-1H-2D clean 5C-4D reverse, 19. North 3D, South 3N. Sound, makes 10.
Clean 5D-4H reverse, 19. North 3C stopper-ask then a long tail to 5D; reverse principle clear but the continuation wanders.
1C-1H-2D clean 5C-4D reverse, 17. North jumps 3N, South passes. Sound, makes 10.
1C-1S-2D clean 5C-4D reverse, 19. North 2H stopper-ask, 2N, 3N. Textbook fourth-suit continuation, makes 11.
1C-1S-2D clean 5C-4D reverse, 17. North 2H stopper-ask, 3N. Sound, makes 11.
1D-1S-2H clean 5D-4H reverse, 18. North has KQ42 hearts and raises straight to 4H. Fit found, makes 11.
1C-1S-2D clean 5C-4D reverse, 17. North 2H stopper-ask, 3N. Sound, makes 10.
1C-1H-2D clean 5C-4D reverse, 17. North 2S stopper-ask, 3N. Sound auction; makes exactly 9.
1C-1H-2D clean 5C-4D reverse, 20. North 3C, South 3N. Sound, makes 11.
Clean 5C-4D reverse, 20. North 2S ask, 2N, 3H, 3N; a multi-step continuation but each step is sound, makes 12.
1C-1H-2D clean 5C-4D reverse, 18. North 3D, 3N. Sound auction; goes down on the cards but bidding is correct.
Clean 5C-4D reverse, 17. Weak North (7) rebids his 6-card spades then 2N; South minimum passes. Sensible low landing.
1C-1H-2D clean 5C-4D reverse, 17. North 2S stopper-ask, 3N. Sound auction; fails on the cards.
1D-1S-2H clean 5D-4H reverse, 17. North 3C stopper-ask, 3N. Sound, makes 9-10.
Clean 5D-4H reverse, 17. North leaps to 5D on 9 with 4 trumps, bypassing 3N; preference 3D or 3N are the orthodox continuations.
1D-1S-2H clean 5D-4H reverse, 19. Weak North (6) gives 3D preference, South tries 3N. Sound auction; fails on the cards.
1D-1S-2H clean 5D-4H reverse, 17. North jumps 3N. Sound, makes 11-12.
1D-1S-2H clean 5D-4H reverse, 19. North 3N. Sound, makes 9.
1C-1H-2D clean 5C-4D reverse, 17. North 3N. Sound, makes 9-10.
1C-1H-2D clean 5C-4D reverse, 17. Weak North (6) raises diamonds to 3D, South passes. Sensible partscore landing for the values.
1D-1S-2H clean 5D-4H reverse, 17. North 3C stopper-ask, 3N. Sound auction; fails on the cards.
1D-1S-2H clean 5D-4H reverse, 20. North 3N. Sound, makes 10-11.
Clean 5D-4H reverse, 19. Weak North (6) rebids his 6-card spades then is raised to 3N. Slight wander, sound.
1C-1H-2D clean 5C-4D reverse, 17. North 3C, 3N. Sound auction; fails on the cards.
1D-1S-2H clean 5D-4H reverse, 19. North 3C stopper-ask, 3N. Sound, makes 10.
1C-1S-2D clean 5C-4D reverse, 17. North 2N natural 6-9; minimum reverse correctly passes 2N. Model textbook restraint.
1C-1H-2D clean 5C-4D reverse, 17. North 2S stopper-ask, 3N. Sound auction; fails on the cards.
1C-1H-2D true reverse: 5C/4D, 18 HCP. North raises 3C, S 3N. Sound; 3N happens to fail DD but the auction shows the principle.
1D-1S-2H reverse: 5D/4H, 19 HCP, clear extras. North 3C asks stopper, S 3N, makes 10. Clean.
1D-1S-2H sound reverse 5D/4H 17, but North's solid 7-card S and the Blackwood slam tail to 6S draw focus off the reverse.
1C-1S-2D reverse: 5C/4D, 17 HCP. North 2H asks stopper, S 3N, makes 11. Clean.
1C-1H-2D reverse 5C/4D 17. North leaps direct 3N on 10 bal. Sound, slightly brisk; 3N fails DD but auction is clean.
1D-1S-2H reverse: 5D/4H, 18 HCP. North 3C asks stopper, S 3N. Clean reverse on display.
1D-1S-2H reverse: 5D/4H, 17 HCP. North 3C asks stopper, S 3N, makes 11. Clean.
1D-1S-2H reverse 5D/4H 17. North 3C, S shows 3-card S support with 3S, North 4S. Nice fit-find after the reverse.
1D-1S-2H reverse: 5D/4H, 19 HCP. North 3C asks stopper, S 3N, makes 11. Clean.
1C-1H-2D reverse 5C/4D 17. Weak North (4D 5H) raises 3D, passed out. Sensible part-score on a misfit; modest wrinkle.
1D-1S-2H reverse fine 5D/4H 17. North's direct 3N on 8 HCP with stiff H is brash; preference 3D is the safer call. 3N off badly DD.
1C-1S-2D reverse 5C/4D 18. North 6-5 majors leaps 4H; S passes. Reaches making 4H. Reverse sound, jump continuation is the wrinkle.

1D-1S-2H reverse: 5D/4H, 18 HCP. North 3C asks stopper, S 3N, makes 11. Clean.
